use_codes.desc: METHOD OF USING COLCHICINE FOR THE PROPHYLAXIS OF GOUT FLARES

indications.text:
2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION 8.4 Pediatric use
2.1 Gout Prophylaxis 8.5 Geriatric Use
8.6 Renal Impairment
3 DOSAGE FORMS AND STRENGTHS 8.7 Hepatic Impairment

MITIGARE (colchicine) capsules are indicated for prophylaxis of gout flares in adults.
Limitations of Use:
The safety and effectiveness of MITIGARE for acute treatment of gout flares during prophylaxis has not been studied.
MITIGARE is not an analgesic medication and should not be used to treat pain...
